title: Kidambi Srikanth Falls in US Open Final
indian_angle: India's top male shuttler Kidambi Srikanth reached the final of the US Open, showcasing strong form.
summary: Kidambi Srikanth's impressive run at the US Open concluded with a defeat in the final against Su Li Yang.

title: Rounak Chouhan Upsets World No 6 Chou Tien Chen at US Open
indian_angle: Young Indian shuttler Rounak Chouhan achieved a significant upset by defeating a top-ranked player at the US Open.
summary: Indian shuttler Rounak Chouhan, a self-proclaimed Cristiano Ronaldo fan, caused a stir at the US Open by beating World No 6 Chou Tien Chen.

title: BAI Releases Addendum for Asia U17 & U15 Junior Championships Selection
indian_angle: This circular from BAI provides crucial updates to the selection process for India's young talent aiming for international junior championships.
summary: Badminton Association of India (BAI) has issued a further addendum to the selection criteria for the upcoming Badminton Asia U17 & U15 Junior Championships 2026.

title: BAI Issues Advisory on Unauthorized Badminton Leagues and Tournaments
indian_angle: The BAI is actively working to regulate and protect the integrity of badminton events within India by warning against unapproved leagues.
summary: The Badminton Association of India has released an advisory cautioning players and stakeholders against participating in unauthorized badminton leagues, tournaments, and championships.

title: Yonex-Sunrise All India Senior Ranking Tournament Scheduled for Chennai
indian_angle: This major domestic ranking tournament provides a crucial platform for Indian senior players to compete and improve their national standings.
summary: The Badminton Association of India has announced the Yonex-Sunrise All India Senior Ranking Badminton Tournament 2026, to be held in Chennai from July 16th to 23rd.
